name: slopguard
description: Local-first static AI reviewer for VS Code: catches code slop, complexity hotspots, and maintainability issues before PRs.
author: Emmanuel Nkasi

commands.title: SlopGuard: Run CLI Scan in Integrated Terminal
SlopGuard: Install CLI for All Terminals

slopguard.enginePath.description: Absolute path to the SlopGuard engine binary.

slopguard.llm.enabled.description: Enable LLM enrichment of engine findings.

slopguard.autoAnalyzeOnSave.description: Automatically analyze code when files are saved.

slopguard.analysisScope.description: Scope used for analysis. Auto prefers selection, then current block, then file.

slopguard.showAutoNotifications.description: Show notifications for auto analysis runs.

slopguard.autoAnalyzeOnIdle.description: Run SlopGuard automatically after you stop typing (Copilot-style). Results appear in the SlopGuard output panel.

slopguard.autoAnalyzeOnIdleDelayMs.description: Delay in ms after last keystroke before auto-analyze runs (when autoAnalyzeOnIdle is enabled).

slopguard.maxAnalyzeLines.description: Maximum lines of code sent to the engine for large files (file scope / fallbacks). Prevents very large buffers from slowing analysis.

slopguard.maxWorkspaceScanFiles.description: Maximum files analyzed by “SlopGuard: Scan Workspace” (findings appear in Problems for files that are not open).

slopguard.maxIssuesDetailed.description: Show full detail for the first N issues; remaining issues appear as one-line summaries.

slopguard.showFirstRunHint.description: Show a one-time tip after install (Quick Actions + shortcuts).

walkthroughs.title: Get started with SlopGuard
walkthroughs.description: Local analysis, scorecards, and symbol impact via the language service.

steps.title: Analyze your code
steps.description:
Open a source file, then run **SlopGuard: Analyze Selection** or use **Cmd+Alt+A** (macOS) / **Ctrl+Alt+A** (Windows/Linux).

[Run: Analyze Selection](command:slopguard.analyzeSelection)

steps.title: Symbol impact (references)
steps.description:
Place the cursor on a symbol, then run **SlopGuard: Show Symbol Impact (References)** to see which files are affected.

[Run: Symbol impact](command:slopguard.symbolImpact)

steps.title: Quick Actions & status bar
steps.description:
Click the **SlopGuard** item in the status bar or run **SlopGuard: Quick Actions** for all commands.

[Open Quick Actions](command:slopguard.quickActions)
